mediaconvert.jobtemplate.accelerationset: Accelerated transcoding can significantly speed up jobs with long, visually complex content. Outputs that use this feature incur pro-tier pricing. For information about feature limitations, For more information, see [Job Limitations for Accelerated Transcoding in AWS Elemental MediaConvert](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/job-requirements.html) in the *AWS Elemental MediaConvert User Guide*.

mediaconvert.jobtemplate.accelerationset.Description: Specify the conditions when the service will run your job with accelerated transcoding.
